hero.title: About Swami Ji
hero.subtitle: The journey of a spiritual luminary

introduction.title: A Beacon of Spiritual Light
introduction.paragraph1: His Holiness Swami Avdheshanand Giri Ji Maharaj is the Acharya Mahamandaleshwar of Juna Akhara — one of the oldest and most revered Hindu monastic orders.
introduction.paragraph2: Born in 1962 in Khurja, Uttar Pradesh, Swami Ji renounced worldly life at the age of 18 and embarked on a solitary journey to the Himalayas.
introduction.paragraph3: Today, as President of the Hindu Dharma Acharya Sabha, he bridges ancient wisdom with contemporary challenges, guiding millions toward inner awakening.

philosophy.title: Philosophy & Vision
philosophy.description: Swami Ji's philosophy rests on the foundation of Advaita Vedanta — the non-dual understanding that the individual self and the universal consciousness are one.
philosophy.quote: True knowledge is not merely information; it is transformation. When wisdom enters the heart, it changes not only how we think but how we live.
